headline: PPH ETF: Drug Pricing Policy and Eli Lilly Concentration Are the Two Risks to Watch in 2026
summary: VanEck Pharmaceutical ETF (NYSEARCA:PPH) exists to give investors broad exposure to the global pharmaceutical industry without the binary risk of betting on a single drug pipeline. Right now, that diversification is being tested by two forces pulling in opposite directions: sweeping U.S. drug pricing policy and a dangerous level of concentration in one stock. The ...
